title: Bubbly Clean Hands
lesson: Washing your hands keeps germs away and keeps you healthy.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a bright sunny garden, playing happily on the grass with a small toy spade, hands a little muddy. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a cheerful smile. Warm natural sunlight, leafy green plants, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A scene just inside a bright home doorway leading toward the kitchen before a snack. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left in the mid-ground, facing three-quarter toward the camera with their face clearly visible and slightly muddy hands held up. In the right foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels gently and points toward a bathroom sink down the hall. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm indoor light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image alone at a bright home bathroom sink, stepping up onto a small step stool and reaching for a colourful bar of soap, with running water and a bottle of hand soap on the counter. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a curious smile. Cheerful bathroom with light tiles, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image alone at the bright bathroom sink, rubbing their soapy hands together low at the sink with lots of fluffy white bubbles, hands kept down at counter level and well away from the face. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a delighted, giggling expression, head up toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible. Sparkling bubbles, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image alone at the bright bathroom sink, holding up freshly rinsed clean hands under the running tap, hands held to one side so they do not cover the face. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a proud, beaming smile. Clean shiny sink, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A warm scene at a sunny kitchen table set for a snack. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a happy smile, clean hands resting beside a plate of fruit. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} sits and looks on warmly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, cheerful morning light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
